title: Lamlad's SSCE & UTME Mathematics
description:
This comprehensive mathematics textbook is designed to help students prepare for the SSCE and UTME exams. It offers revision strategies, a summary of key notes, and worked examples and drills to aid understanding. With over 1,000 SSCE and UTME-style questions, along with detailed solutions, it provides an excellent resource for thorough exam preparation.

The textbook is written by J. O. Ajayi, O. Ajaja, and A. B. Fagbohun, offering the most extensive SSCE/UTME revision content available.
